metadata.name: Harvey Cabeleireiro
metadata.title: Harvey Cabeleireiro | Men's Barbershop in Carcavelos
metadata.description: Men's barbershop in Carcavelos with 20+ years of history. Expert haircuts, beard trims, and fades in a warm, welcoming atmosphere. Book your appointment today.
metadata.address: R. Dr. José Joaquim de Almeida 520-B, 2775-594 Carcavelos

hero.tagline: Men's barbershop in Carcavelos — where every cut tells a story

about.title: More Than a Barbershop
about.description: Harvey Cabeleireiro isn't just a place to get a haircut — it's where generations of men have trusted the same hands to craft their look. With over 20 years in Carcavelos, Harvey and his team have built something rare: a barbershop where every client feels like family.
about.description2: Step inside and you'll notice something different. Alongside the classic barber chairs and the buzz of clippers, there's a curated collection of movie car memorabilia — a reflection of Harvey's personality and the shop's unique character.

items.title: Haircut
items.description: Classic and modern cuts tailored to your style. From fades to scissor cuts, our team delivers precision every time.

items.title: Fade Cut
items.description: Clean degradês with seamless blending. Our specialty — from skin fades to mid fades, always sharp.

items.title: Beard Trim
items.description: Sculpted beard shaping and maintenance. Clean lines, proper contouring, finished with care.

items.title: Hair Wash
items.description: Relaxing wash and conditioning treatment. The perfect complement to any cut.

beforeAfter.title: The Difference Is in the Detail

items.name: Akira
items.text: Finding a barber who gets it right the first time and every time after is near impossible. Since I found Harvey, the search is over. Extremely competent and welcoming. Highly recommend for any man, whether for a cut or beard trim.

items.name: Jorge Martinho
items.text: The only barbershop I've been going to for over 20 years. You always leave with a great cut. Don't forget — they work by appointment!

items.name: Pedro L.G
items.text: This place has a lot of history in Carcavelos and keeps evolving. Very reasonable prices, great attention to the client, with an especially attentive owner.

items.name: João Moura
items.text: Very professional and efficient. Being able to book in advance saves a lot of time. I've been a client for over 10 years.

items.name: Vitor Sancho
items.text: Very professional team. I've been going there for a while now and the hair always comes out great. Make sure to call ahead — you might not get a spot otherwise.

contact.title: Book Your Appointment
contact.description: We work by appointment — call us to reserve your slot. Walk-ins welcome when available.
contact.address: R. Dr. José Joaquim de Almeida 520-B, 2775-594 Carcavelos

footer.tagline: Men's barbershop in Carcavelos since day one.
footer.address: R. Dr. José Joaquim de Almeida 520-B, 2775-594 Carcavelos

home.title: Harvey Cabeleireiro
